name: @chiefaia/critic
description: Pre-commit adversarial review agent. Reads PR diffs, runs deterministic pattern detectors plus LLM-reasoned adversarial review (claude binary, subscription-only) against Mentor's 18-category failure-mode taxonomy, files findings as PR comments. Steward consumes blocking findings (severity >= high). Tier-A item 9 of agent_ecosystem_expansion_directive.md. Option E shape — private workspace package, parameterised constructor, fixture-tested.
